title: What It Actually Looks Like to Win the War With Your Phone
caption:
A detox won't fix this.

You need a war. Not a break.

A "struggle" is something you're managing. A war is something you're winning or losing. When you name it correctly, the strategy changes — you stop trying to moderate and start thinking about how to take ground back.

Screen-time limits are easy to override. You need structural change: routes that are simply gone. Delete the apps that only exist for the impulse. Put the phone in a different room at night.

And figure out what the phone was actually filling — silence, boredom, the itch to avoid — then put something better there.

"Whatever is true, whatever is honorable, whatever is pure… think about these things." — Philippians 4:8.

The mind you feed is the man you become.

—

Save this. Use it tonight.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #selfcontrol #scripture
